properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: A King like this, majesty Laying in a manger A King like this Unto us is born a Savior The Light, the Light has come A King like this, the highest Name and the song of heaven A King like this born of Flesh into our suffering The Light, the Light has come

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He is Christ, the Lord He is Christ, our Savior I bow my heart before no other name I bow my heart before no other King

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: A King like this, a saving Love that would not forsake us Betrayed by a kiss and led To the cross for our forgiveness The Light, the Light has come

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: We lift up our eyes, The Light has come! We lift up our eyes, The Light has come! We lift up our eyes, The Light has come! We lift up our eyes, Lift up our eyes, Lift up Your Eyes!

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: He is Christ, the Lord He is Christ, our Savior He is Christ, the Lord He is Christ, our Savior I bow my heart before no other name I bow my heart before no other King I bow my heart before no other name I bow my heart before no other King

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: A King like this, a throne of grace That will stand forever The angels sing glory, glory, hallelujah The Light, the Light has come The Light, the Light has come
